subcodes.first_line: O Hudhud! We make mention of thee through remembering Our sister, and her days, and how her heart was ablaze with the fire of her Lord's love
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love of God
